chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 528 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنَّ اَلْبَلاَءَ وَ اَلصَّبْرَ يَسْتَبِقَانِ إِلَى اَلْمُؤْمِنِ فَيَأْتِيهِ اَلْبَلاَءُ وَ هُوَ صَبُورٌ وَ إِنَّ اَلْجَزَعَ وَ اَلْبَلاَءَ يَسْتَبِقَانِ إِلَى اَلْكَافِرِ فَيَأْتِيهِ اَلْبَلاَءُ وَ هُوَ جَزُوعٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.528 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, trials and patience race toward the believer, so when trials reach him, he is patient. But panic and trials race toward the disbeliever, so when trials reach him, he panics."
